pm-kisan.description: A central sector scheme to provide financial assistance to all landholding farmers families in the country to supplement their financial needs in procuring various inputs related to agriculture and allied activities.
pm-kisan.eligibilityCriteria: All landholding farmers families are eligible. Institutional landholders and professional families (Doctors, Engineers, etc.) are excluded.
pm-kisan.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each every four months directly into bank accounts.
pm-kisan.applicationProcess: Register online at PM-Kisan portal or visit nearest CSC (Common Service Centre).

ayushman-bharat.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
ayushman-bharat.description: The world's largest health insurance scheme providing a cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
ayushman-bharat.eligibilityCriteria: Families identified by SECC 2011 data based on deprivation and occupational criteria.
ayushman-bharat.benefits: Cashless and paperless treatment in empanelled public and private hospitals up to ₹5 Lakhs per year.
ayushman-bharat.applicationProcess: Check eligibility on portal, visit empanelled hospital with Aadhaar/Ration card.

pm-vishwakarma.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
pm-vishwakarma.description: Support for artisans and craftspeople who work with tools and hands, providing recognition and credit support.
pm-vishwakarma.eligibilityCriteria: Artisans engaged in 18 traditional trades (Carpenters, Blacksmiths, etc.). Only one member per family.
pm-vishwakarma.benefits: PM Vishwakarma Certificate, ₹15,000 toolkit incentive, credit support up to ₹3 Lakhs at 5% interest.
pm-vishwakarma.applicationProcess: Register at CSCs using biometric authentication.

lakhpati-didi.description: Empowering rural women to earn at least ₹1 Lakh annually through micro-enterprises and SHG support.
lakhpati-didi.eligibilityCriteria: Women members of Self Help Groups (SHGs) in rural areas.
lakhpati-didi.benefits: Interest-free loans, skill training in LED bulb making, plumbing, drone repair, etc.
lakhpati-didi.applicationProcess: Apply through your local SHG or Block Development Office.
